title: KAHEIGN 32Pcs Unbreakable Black Plastic Dinnerware Set, 8 Sets of 25cm Dinner Plates, 20cm Salad Plates, 720ml Bowls, 360ml Cups - Microwave & Dishwasher Safe
features: [Value dinnerware set] The unbreakable plastic dinner set included 8pcs 25cm dinner plates, 8pcs 20cm salad plates, 8pcs 720ml bowls, 8pcs 360ml cups, with smooth round edge and modern style
[Eco-friendly] Made of high-quality pp plastic material, non-toxic and eco-friendly, 100% food grade, BPA-free, in line with FDA standards, sturdy and durable, not easy to break and age, safe to use

[Easy to use] The dinnerware are safe to use in the dishwasher and microwave, can be used safely in microwave 248℉ (120 °C) for 5 minutes and dishwasher 2 hours, and will not react with food or beverages

[Applicable] Perfect for every meal, serving pasta, sandwich, bread and butter, dessert, soup, rice, salad, appetizer, etc. Not only decorate food, table and kitchen, but also bring appetite to family and friend

[Holiday gift idea] Each KAHEIGN unbreakable dinnerware comes with a beautiful and eco-friendly packaging box, perfect for daily meals or drinks in camping, party, picnic and home, outdoor or travel. At the same time, it will be a good holiday gift for friends
description: Product Description KAHEIGN 32Pcs Unbreakable Plastic Dinnerware Set
